case_title: MANCINAS, SANTOS vs. ROGER TURCIOS IND DBA ROGER PAINTING

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MANCINAS, SANTOS AS TO DEFENDANT ROGER TURCIOS IND DBA ROGER PAINTING
